abstract: An atom that specifies information for a link hot spot.
overview:
## Overview

The link hot spot atom specifies information for hot spots of type `kQTVRHotSpotLinkType` (’`link'`). Its atom type is thus `'link'`. The link hot spot atom contains specific information about a link hot spot.

The structure of a link hot spot atom is defined by the `QTVRLinkHotSpotAtom` data type:

Certain fields in the link hot spot atom are not used by QuickTime VR. The `fromValidFlags` field is generally set to 0 and the other `from` fields are not used. However, these fields could be quite useful if you have created a transition movie from one node to another. The from angles can be used to swing the current view of the source node to align with the first frame of the transition movie. The `distance` field is intended for use with 3D applications, but is also not used by QuickTime VR.

items.description: The major version number of the file format.
items.name: majorVersion

items.description: The minor version number of the file format.
items.name: minorVersion

items.description: The ID of the destination node.
items.name: toNodeID

items.description: A set of flags that indicate which source node view settings are valid.
items.name: fromValidFlags

items.description: The preferred from-pan angle at the source node.
items.name: fromPan

items.description: The preferred from-tilt angle at the source node.
items.name: fromTilt

items.description: The preferred from-field of view at the source node.
items.name: fromFOV

items.description: The preferred from-view center at the source node.
items.name: fromViewCenter

items.description: A set of flags that indicate which destination node view settings are valid.
items.name: toValidFlags

items.description: The pan angle to use when displaying the destination node.
items.name: toPan

items.description: The tilt angle to use when displaying the destination node.
items.name: toTilt

items.description: The field of view to use when displaying the destination node.
items.name: toFOV

items.description: The view center to use when displaying the destination node.
items.name: toViewCenter

items.description: The distance between the source node and the destination node.
items.name: distance

items.description: A set of link hot spot flags.
items.name: flags

items.description: Reserved.
items.name: reserved1

items.description: Reserved.
items.name: reserved2

items.description: An atom that describes the type and ID of a node, as well as other information about the node.
items.name: Node header atom ('ndhd')

items.description: An atom that is the parent for all hot spot atoms for the node.

items.description: An atom that contains general information about a hot spot.
items.name: Hot spot information atom ('hsin')

items.description: An atom that identified the hot spot type.

title: Link hot spot atom ('link')
